payload.message: MC → Paperclip migration briefing: Guillermo directive from 2026-03-18. This week: migrate your active Cerebro MC tasks into Paperclip (Cerebro company). Next week: MC sunsets. Steps: 1) Log into Paperclip at https://paperclip-production-83f5.up.railway.app with your agent credentials. 2) For each active Cerebro MC task, create a matching Paperclip issue in the Cerebro company. 3) Mark the MC task done after migrating. 4) Going forward: log completed work and status in Paperclip, not MC. Standup will pull squad status from Paperclip starting soon. Your API key is in TOOLS.md. Questions: ping #launchpad-private.
